title_en: What to expect at your first Assessment Facial
title_el: Τι να περιμένεις στο πρώτο Assessment Facial
excerpt_en: A 90-minute session that maps your skin, sets your home-care plan, and opens the door to every other treatment on the menu.
excerpt_el: Συνεδρία 90 λεπτών που χαρτογραφεί το δέρμα σου και καθορίζει τη σωστή πορεία.
body_en:
The first appointment is about getting the right starting line, not the quickest facial. We review medical and skincare history, examine skin under magnification, and build a 90-day plan that combines the right in-studio treatments with the right products at home.

What's included

Consultation, double-cleanse, enzyme or gentle acid exfoliation, extractions where indicated, and a customised mask + finishing serums. You leave with a written plan and a timeline.

Why the Assessment is non-negotiable

Advanced treatments — microneedling, deeper peels, Hydrafacial boosters — need an informed starting point. Jumping in without it risks over-treating and setting you back weeks.
body_el: Το πρώτο ραντεβού είναι για σωστή αφετηρία, όχι για γρήγορο αποτέλεσμα. Βλέπουμε ιατρικό ιστορικό, εξετάζουμε το δέρμα, και φτιάχνουμε πρόγραμμα 90 ημερών.

title_en: The Face Reality Acne Bootcamp — how the 90-day programme works
title_el: Face Reality Acne Bootcamp — πώς δουλεύει σε 90 μέρες
excerpt_en: Structured acne clearing for adults. Consultation, home routine, bi-weekly progress facials, and written accountability.
excerpt_el: Πρόγραμμα για ακμή ενηλίκων. Consultation, πρωτόκολλο σπιτιού, θεραπείες ανά δύο εβδομάδες, γραπτή υπευθυνότητα.
body_en:
Acne isn't just a surface problem — hormonal, dietary and product triggers all feed it. Face Reality is the protocol we use for consistent clearing in adults who want their skin calm, not camouflaged.

Phase 1 — weeks 1–4

Product acclimation. We introduce the home routine in three steps and monitor for irritation. Early breakouts are expected and part of the clearing curve.

Phase 2 — weeks 5–10

Escalation. Concentrations are adjusted, actives are layered, and bi-weekly in-studio facials accelerate turnover.
body_el: Η ακμή δεν είναι μόνο επιφανειακή — ορμονικά, διατροφή και προϊόντα παίζουν ρόλο.

title_en: Bridal skin plan — where to start six months out
title_el: Πρόγραμμα νυφικού δέρματος — 6 μήνες πριν τον γάμο
excerpt_en: The single biggest mistake is doing something aggressive two weeks before the wedding. Here's the timeline that actually works.
excerpt_el: Το πιο συχνό λάθος είναι μια επιθετική θεραπεία 2 εβδομάδες πριν.
body_en:
A glowing wedding-day face is never the result of a single last-minute treatment. Six months of consistent, compounding work is.

Month 6 — map the skin

Assessment Facial, baseline photos, home routine adjusted. Any concerns on the table now.

Months 5–3 — do the work

Monthly Hydrafacial or signature facial. If microneedling suits, run a series of three, six weeks apart.

Month 1 — refine, don't reinvent

Nothing new this month. Gentle maintenance facial 10–14 days before the wedding. No new products.
body_el: Λαμπερό δέρμα τη μέρα του γάμου δε βγαίνει από μία θεραπεία της τελευταίας στιγμής.

title_en: The 4-step routine that does 90% of the work
title_el: Η 4-step ρουτίνα που κάνει το 90% της δουλειάς
excerpt_en: Cleanse, actives, moisturiser, SPF. Everything else is optional — here is how to pick the right version of each.
excerpt_el: Καθάρισμα, ενεργά, ενυδάτωση, αντηλιακό. Τα υπόλοιπα είναι προαιρετικά.
body_en:
Most people over-complicate skincare. The four steps below — executed consistently — outperform any 10-step routine you see on social media.

1. Cleanse

Morning: water-only or gentle gel. Night: oil or balm first, then gel.

2. Actives

Vitamin C in the morning, retinoid at night. Start slow, layer hydration on either side.

3. Moisturiser

Match it to the season, not to the bottle's marketing.

4. SPF

Broad-spectrum SPF 30+, every single morning.
